contract_meta.rationale: Sandbox timeouts can leave orphaned subprocesses due to shell wrapping and single-process signaling. This leads to resource leaks (CPU, file handles, ports) and undermines deterministic, safe execution. We must ensure process-group termination on timeout with bounded cleanup and verification.

project.name: ai_system_executor-mvp
project.goal: Ensure sandboxed test execution terminates entire subprocess groups on timeout to prevent orphaned processes and guarantee stable, deterministic runs.

execution_model.verification_strategy: unit + integration tests with timeout simulation
execution_model.description: Map exact spawn/kill behavior, implement process-group termination, validate no orphaned processes post-timeout.
execution_model.failure_mode: Orphaned subprocess continues running after timeout

observability.description: Trace and evidence for runner change

tasks.title: Map spawn/kill behavior and timeout paths
tasks.description: Identify exact lines and behavior for spawn options (shell, detached) and kill on timeout.
actions: Document current spawn options and signal handling
Verify whether child process group is created and how kill is invoked
Produce discovery note with file/line references
validation: References include runInSandbox.ts exact line ranges
success_criteria: Evidence file produced with code excerpts and risks

tasks.title: Implement process-group termination on timeout
tasks.description: Spawn with process group where supported and kill the entire group on timeout. Fallback to child kill if group kill not available.
actions: Enable detached process group on POSIX where safe
On timeout, use negative PID kill (process.kill(-pid)) with fallback
Unref when detached to avoid holding event loop
Keep shell usage only if required by command form
success_criteria: Timeout reliably terminates all child processes
No orphaned processes observed after run

tasks.title: Add integration test simulating long-running child
tasks.description: Create a test that triggers sandbox timeout and verifies no child keeps running post-timeout.
actions: Simulate a script that ignores SIGTERM; ensure timeout kill stops it
Assert run result indicates timeout and logs contain termination info
validation: Test fails before implementation and passes after
CI tests pass with coverage unchanged or improved
success_criteria: Test reliably passes in CI across runs

tasks.title: Produce evidence and validation report
tasks.description: Collect logs and final artifacts; update validation report.
actions: Attach relevant log excerpts showing termination
validation: Evidence files exist and include run IDs

fallback_policies.group_kill_not_supported: Fallback to direct child kill and explicit cleanup; document limitations

ai_executor_guidelines.avoid_new_deps: Do not add external kill-tree dependencies without explicit approval
ai_executor_guidelines.posix_group_kill: Prefer process group kill on POSIX via negative PID

governance_note.for_human: This change is backend-only and must not impact UI Phase A scope. Schedule under Phase B.
